events.title: Microsoft Edge: v.144 - Contextual nudges on address bar offering help summarizing webpages.
events.titleJa: Edge アドレスバーで要約提案を表示
events.titleEn: Microsoft Edge: v.144 - Contextual nudges on address bar offering help summarizing webpages.
events.summary: Microsoft Edge for Business plans to introduce an easy way for users to get summaries of their open page from the address bar using Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat. This feature seeks to help users more easily understand relevant content and save time.
events.summaryJa: Microsoft Edge for Business plans to introduce an easy way for users to get summaries of their open page from the address bar using Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat. This feature seeks to help users more easily understand relevant content and save time.
events.summaryEn: Microsoft Edge for Business plans to introduce an easy way for users to get summaries of their open page from the address bar using Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat. This feature seeks to help users more easily understand relevant content and save time.
events.importanceReason: 提供開始済みで利用可否の確認に直結するため / ライセンス設計や展開判断に直結するため

events.title: Microsoft Viva: Satisfaction Rate Metric for Microsoft 365 Copilot in Copilot Dashboard
events.titleJa: Copilot Dashboard に満足度メトリクスを追加
events.titleEn: Microsoft Viva: Satisfaction Rate Metric for Microsoft 365 Copilot in Copilot Dashboard
events.summary: Track user sentiment of Microsoft 365 Copilot. Understand how users perceive Copilot value by analyzing the breakdown of thumbs up and thumbs down ratings after Copilot interactions. See trends over time and breakdowns by group.
events.summaryJa: Track user sentiment of Microsoft 365 Copilot. Understand how users perceive Copilot value by analyzing the breakdown of thumbs up and thumbs down ratings after Copilot interactions. See trends over time and breakdowns by group.
events.summaryEn: Track user sentiment of Microsoft 365 Copilot. Understand how users perceive Copilot value by analyzing the breakdown of thumbs up and thumbs down ratings after Copilot interactions. See trends over time and breakdowns by group.

events.title: Microsoft Teams: Digital signage support for Teams panels
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Microsoft Teams: Digital signage support for Teams panels
events.summary: Digital signage can now be displayed on idle Teams panel devices, similar to digital signage support for Microsoft Teams Rooms front of room displays. Signage source and settings can be configured in the Pro Management portal. Available with Teams Rooms Pro or Shared space-licensed spaces.
events.summaryJa: Digital signage can now be displayed on idle Teams panel devices, similar to digital signage support for Microsoft Teams Rooms front of room displays. events.title: PowerPoint: Create and Edit images with the model of your choice
events.titleJa: PowerPoint で画像生成・編集モデルを選択可能に
events.titleEn: PowerPoint: Create and Edit images with the model of your choice
events.summary: You can now choose your preferred image model including OpenAI’s GPT Image, Flux, or Auto for smart, dynamic selection when creating or editing images with Copilot in PowerPoint, or when generating a new presentation or page.

events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Researcher Agent for GCC
events.titleJa: GCC で Researcher Agent に対応
events.titleEn: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Researcher Agent for GCC
events.summary: Researcher will be available for Microsoft 365 business and enterprise users with a Microsoft 365 Copilot add-on license. Researcher is an advanced deep reasoning agent in Microsoft 365 Copilot designed to tackle complex, multi-step tasks by acting as a deep research assistant.
events.summaryJa: Researcher will be available for Microsoft 365 business and enterprise users with a Microsoft 365 Copilot add-on license. Researcher is an advanced deep reasoning agent in Microsoft 365 Copilot designed to tackle complex, multi-step tasks by acting as a deep research assistant.
